newsBriefing: Napoli protected home ground in a tense 2-1 win over Torino, with early and late scoring moments setting up a valuable three-point result in the final third of the Serie A season.

games.headline: Napoli hold off Torino after Santos and Elmas build cushion
games.brief: Napoli controlled long stretches and did enough in both boxes to edge Torino 2-1 in a match that stayed alive until the final whistle. Alisson Santos gave Napoli an early lift with a strike from outside the area, and Eljif Elmas doubled the lead in the 68th minute after smart setup work from Matteo Politano. Torino's late header from Cesare Casadei created real late tension, but Napoli managed the final minutes and closed out an important home win.
bullets: Napoli won 2-1 at the Stadio Diego Armando Maradona in Round 28.
Alisson Santos scored in the 7th minute from outside the box, his second league goal this season.
Eljif Elmas made it 2-0 in the 68th minute for his first Serie A goal of the campaign.
Matteo Politano assisted the winner with a headed setup in the box.
Cesare Casadei scored in the 87th minute for Torino, but Napoli held on through stoppage time.
games.context: The result keeps Napoli's momentum intact heading into the final stretch of the Serie A table race.
